'''âl-k-b-j''' ('''kalakbejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:phonemicize|phonemicize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phonemicize|phonemicize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-k-b-j
|-
! Lemma
| kalakbejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilakbejoko|thilakbejoko]] || [[word:jilakbejoko|jilakbejoko]] || [[word:shilakbejoko|shilakbejoko]] || [[word:kilakbejoko|kilakbejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulakbejoko|thuthulakbejoko]] || [[word:jujulakbejoko|jujulakbejoko]] || [[word:shushulakbejoko|shushulakbejoko]] || [[word:kukulakbejoko|kukulakbejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholakbejoko|tholakbejoko]] || [[word:jolakbejoko|jolakbejoko]] || [[word:sholakbejoko|sholakbejoko]] || [[word:kolakbejoko|kolakbejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlakbejoko|thĂŠlakbejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠlakbejoko|jĂŠlakbejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠlakbejoko|shĂŠlakbejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠlakbejoko|kĂŠlakbejoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalakbejoko|thalakbejoko]] || [[word:jalakbejoko|jalakbejoko]] || [[word:shalakbejoko|shalakbejoko]] || [[word:kalakbejoko|kalakbejoko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
